rendered_text: 抱歉，系统超时，请稍后重试。
notes: iter7 HTTP-axis JSON envelope (Content-Type: application/json, Connection: close, X-Response-Complete: 1, block-style {success, requestId, data:{choices:[{message,finish_reason,index}],model,id,object,created}}, NO SSE event: lines) did NOT bypass native 系统超时. Identical frontend rendering to iter6 #991: only '抱歉，系统超时，请稍后重试。' shown, no '차단' warning. Hypothesis REJECTED: Content-Type/SSE-format is not the trigger. The native timeout fires regardless of envelope shape (SSE with audit_info, SSE without audit_info, HTTP JSON block-style). Suggests frontend timer is purely time-based (wall clock from request submit to first useful streamed token) and engine intercept is either (a) not firing, (b) responding too slowly past frontend timeout, or (c) response body is being discarded before reaching the React tree. Next axis candidates: (1) latency/timing — return response within <Nms of request, (2) verify engine intercept actually fires (etapd logs / wireshark on test PC), (3) try mirrored upstream response shape from a benign baseline capture (replay genuine qianwen response with content swapped). Frontend behaviour is now well-characterized: 系统超时 is the universal sink for any non-conforming response.
compare_iter6: Identical visible behaviour to iter6 #991; envelope axis (SSE vs HTTP) has zero observable effect on frontend timeout.
